hero_sub: Professional nail care, manicures, pedicures, and spa treatments in Durham

services.title: Manicures & Pedicures
services.body: Manicures & Pedicures – classic and gel options, hand and foot care, with soothing aromatherapy

services.title: Facial Treatments
services.body: Facial Treatments – deep cleansing, microdermabrasion, and anti‑ageing masks using professional grade products

services.title: Waxing & Hair Removal
services.body: Waxing & Hair Removal – Brazilian, bikini, leg, and eyebrow waxing with gentle, hypoallergenic wax

about: Amber nails & spa provides a range of nail and spa treatments in Durham. Bookings can be made via email at ambernailspa2268@gmail.com

faq.q: What area does Amber Nails & Spa serve?
faq.a: Amber Nails & Spa is located in Durham and serves clients in the surrounding Durham area

faq.q: How can I book an appointment?
faq.a: Appointments can be booked by emailing ambernailspa2268@gmail.com. The salon will reply to confirm availability

faq.q: What should I expect during my first visit?
faq.a: You will be welcomed in a clean, professional environment. The staff will discuss the service you want, advise on any preparation needed, and carry out the treatment using standard hygiene practices
